channel.title: Vantage Blog — AI Job Prep, CV Optimisation, Interview Strategy
channel.description: Practical, current guides on AI job preparation, CV optimisation, ATS-friendly resumes, cover letters, and interview strategy.

item.title: How to use ChatGPT to prep for an interview (without sounding like a bot)
item.description: A working ChatGPT interview prep workflow used by real candidates in 2026. Specific prompts, the exact order to run them, and how to keep your answers sounding human.

item.title: The 30-second CV review test recruiters actually run
item.description: Recruiters spend less than a minute on your CV before deciding. Here is the exact 30-second scan they run, what they look for, and how to write a CV that wins it.

item.title: The 5-minute interview pitch that gets you remembered
item.description: Most candidates wing the "tell us about yourself" question. The strongest candidates have a 5-minute pitch they can compress to 90 seconds. Here is exactly how to build it.

item.title: How to prep for any job interview in 20 minutes
item.description: A concrete 20-minute interview prep routine used by people applying to 50+ jobs a week. Company research, fit check, likely questions, and a mock drill — no BS, no fluff.

item.title: What ATS screening software actually checks in 2026
item.description: A plain-English breakdown of how modern applicant tracking systems parse CVs in 2026. What gets flagged, what gets filtered, and what to fix before you hit submit.

item.title: The 4 cover letter tones, and when each one wins
item.description: Not every role wants the same cover letter. The right tone depends on the company culture. Here are the four tones that cover most cases, with examples and a rule for when each one wins.
